phrases.intent_en: Ask if Turin has canals like Milan
phrases.text_local: Scusi, anche Torino ha dei navigli come Milano?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, AN-keh toh-REE-noh ah day nah-VEEL-yee KOH-meh mee-LAH-noh?
phrases.cultural_note: Turin's navigli were mostly buried underground in the 19th century; small sections remain visible near Piazza Borgo Dora.

responses.english: Yes, but mostly underground, with few visible remains.
responses.phonetic: see, mah KWAH-zee TOOT-tee een-ter-RAH-tee, POH-kee RES-tee vee-ZEE-bee-lee.
responses.local: Sì, ma quasi tutti interrati, pochi resti visibili.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the remaining canal traces
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si vedono i resti dei navigli torinesi?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see VEH-doh-noh ee RES-tee day nah-VEEL-yee toh-ree-NEH-zee?

responses.english: Near Piazza Borgo Dora and on Via Cottolengo.
responses.phonetic: vee-CHEE-noh ah PYAHT-tsah BOR-goh DOH-rah eh een VEE-ah kot-toh-LEN-goh.
responses.local: Vicino a Piazza Borgo Dora e in Via Cottolengo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Balon flea market is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il mercato delle pulci Balon?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel mer-KAH-toh DEL-leh POOL-chee bah-LON?
phrases.cultural_note: The Balon is Turin's famous weekly antique market, held on Saturdays in the Borgo Dora district.

responses.english: At Piazza Borgo Dora, on Saturday mornings.
responses.phonetic: een PYAHT-tsah BOR-goh DOH-rah, eel SAH-bah-toh mat-TEE-nah.
responses.local: In Piazza Borgo Dora, il sabato mattina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus goes to the Balon from Piazza Castello
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quale bus va al Balon da Piazza Castello?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAH-leh boos vah al bah-LON dah PYAHT-tsah kas-TEL-loh?

responses.phonetic: eel treh-DEE-chee oh eel cheen-kwan-TOO-noh, fer-MAH-tah BOR-goh DOH-rah.
responses.local: Il 13 o il 51, fermata Borgo Dora.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the underground canal system can be visited
phrases.text_local: Scusi, si possono visitare i navigli sotterranei di Torino?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see pos-SOH-noh vee-zee-TAH-reh ee nah-VEEL-yee sot-teh-RAH-neh-ee dee toh-REE-noh?

responses.english: Yes, with guided tours organised by the Navigli Association.
responses.phonetic: see, kon VEE-zee-teh goo-ee-DAH-teh or-gah-neet-TSAH-teh dal-las-soh-chah-TSYOH-neh nah-VEEL-yee.
responses.local: Sì, con visite guidate organizzate dall'Associazione Navigli.
